overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a dark, atmospheric underground black market. The environment features industrial architecture with vibrant neon lighting, weapon vendors, scattered crowds, and multi-level scaffolding structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground weapon vendor stall with graffiti art

events.description: approaches vendor table displaying weapons and merchandise

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward a weapon vendor stall while observing the colorful graffiti mural behind the table

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the weapon display table, facing the approaching player

entered.detail: white table displaying various firearms and weapon attachments
large wall covered in vibrant red, yellow, and green spray paint art with skull motifs
glowing blue neon advertisements in the background
long fluorescent light strips illuminating the market area

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a weapon vendor stall in a dimly lit underground market. A colorful graffiti mural covers the wall behind the table, which displays various firearms. The vendor stands ready as the player moves closer to examine the merchandise.

scene_state.functional_zone: main market concourse with neon storefronts

events.description: turns away from vendor stall and enters the main market thoroughfare with neon lighting
slows slightly while navigating through a crowd gathered near neon-lit storefronts

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking through the bustling market concourse, passing by various NPCs and neon storefronts

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing and conversing near the neon bar counter

entered.detail: bright red neon-lit store counter with glowing edges
large illuminated displays showing weapon advertisements
thick industrial concrete columns supporting the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The player turns into the main market concourse, leaving the vendor stall behind. The area opens up into a wider space with red neon storefronts on the right and digital advertising screens displaying weapons. Various NPCs populate the area, some standing near the glowing bar counter while others walk through the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark corridor leading to secured gate with red lighting

events.description: lighting shifts from bright neon to dim red emergency lighting as the corridor narrows
begins ascending metal stairs toward the security gate

agents.ego_description: walking through a darker corridor toward a red-lit security checkpoint, then climbing metal stairs

notable_agents.action: security guard standing near the metal gate, monitoring the area

entered.detail: large metal barred gate blocking the corridor, illuminated by red lights
dim red lights casting an emergency glow over the area
stacked sandbags forming a defensive position near the gate
grated metal staircase leading up to the security checkpoint

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a darker, more confined corridor with red emergency lighting replacing the neon glow. The player approaches a metal security gate guarded by an NPC, with sandbag barricades positioned nearby. The player then begins ascending a metal staircase toward the checkpoint.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper overlook platform with view of main market below

events.description: reaches the top of stairs and emerges onto an overlook platform with railing overlooking the market
pauses briefly at the railing to look down at the market activity below before continuing

agents.ego_description: climbing to an upper overlook, pausing to look down at the market from the railing, then continuing along the catwalk

notable_agents.action: guard standing at the top of the stairs, overlooking the area

entered.detail: metal safety railing along the edge of the upper platform
view looking down at the main market concourse from above, showing neon lights and crowds below
metal scaffolding and construction framework along the right side

segments.scene_description: The player reaches an upper overlook platform with a metal railing, providing a bird's-eye view of the neon-lit market below. After a brief pause to observe the activity from above, the player continues along the upper catwalk, passing scaffolding structures and moving toward the next area.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper maintenance level with scaffolding and exit stairs

events.description: approaching a bright light source at the end of the dark corridor creates high contrast
ascending final flight of stairs toward the brightly lit exit

agents.ego_description: walking through a darker upper level with scaffolding, then climbing final stairs toward a bright exit light

entered.detail: intense bright white light streaming from an opening at the end of the corridor
metal chain link fencing blocking off construction areas
elevated walkway with metal grating underfoot

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a darker upper maintenance level with chain-link fences and scaffolding, heading toward a bright exit light at the end of the corridor. The segment ends as the player ascends the final staircase toward the intense light source, leaving the underground market behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit underground black market that gradually ascends into a stark, industrial maintenance area. It begins by approaching a weapon vendor's stall set against a colorful graffiti mural before turning away to enter a wide concourse filled with red neon storefronts, digital advertisements, and drifting crowds. The scene then shifts into a confined corridor where the vibrant glow is replaced by red emergency lighting and sandbag barricades, leading the camera up a metal staircase toward a security checkpoint. As the camera reaches an upper overlook, the view expands to reveal the bustling market below from a high catwalk surrounded by scaffolding. Finally, the movement progresses through a dark maintenance level of chain-link fences and metal beams, ascending a final set of stairs toward an intense, blinding light at the exit.
